label: default agent • activate (switch to) an agent by id
query: Switch to the agent with id 8d3b1f6a-4c20-47e9-b5a1-2f7c9e043d18.
notes: action 'activate' with id. Unknown id → typed not-found error (no switch). The selection assertion pins the 'activate' action (not the literal UUID — small models mis-transcribe 32-hex-digit ids; the action is the behavior under test), proving the model maps "switch to" onto activate rather than create.
